hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const o=JSON.parse(d); console.log((o.tool_input||{}).file_path||(o.tool_response||{}).filePath||''); })" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/apps/web/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && cd "D:/laragon/www/nextoffice/apps/web" && npx eslint --fix "$f" --no-warn-ignored 2>/dev/null || true; }

node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const o=JSON.parse(d); console.log((o.tool_input||{}).file_path||(o.tool_response||{}).filePath||''); })" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/apps/web/.*\.tsx?$' && cd "D:/laragon/www/nextoffice/apps/web" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15 || true; }

node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const o=JSON.parse(d); console.log((o.tool_input||{}).file_path||(o.tool_response||{}).filePath||''); })" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/apps/api/.*\.tsx?$' && cd "D:/laragon/www/nextoffice/apps/api" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15 || true; }
